problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: TrustGraph AI: Audit-Ready Tender Evaluation with Evidence-Based Decision Mapping (CRPF)
summary: Design a technical platform to understand tender documents, evaluate bidders' eligibility, and produce explainable evaluation reports based on the CRPF's audit-ready tender evaluation system with evidence-based decision mapping.
